researcher_probes.description: Researcher probes grounded in Semantic Scholar citation counts

methodology.source: Semantic Scholar API + DBLP + university websites
methodology.T5_criteria: 200-1000 total citations, published at top systems venues
methodology.T6_criteria: 20-200 total citations, published at top systems venues
methodology.T7_criteria: <20 total citations, very recent or niche researchers
methodology.verification: Each fact cross-verified against at least 2 web sources

researcher_probes.note: Probe generation requires web API access. This script defines the methodology; actual probe collection requires running the Semantic Scholar pipeline.

city_probes.description: City population probes grounded in official census data

methodology.source: Wikipedia list articles + national census databases
methodology.T5_criteria: Cities with population 5,000-50,000 and <100 Google results for '[city] population'
methodology.T6_criteria: Towns with population 500-5,000 and <10 Google results
methodology.T7_criteria: Villages with population <500 and essentially 1 source
methodology.verification: Population verified against official census data
